      Create Alternative Order

      Creates an order for an alternative investment asset.

      Returns:
      The call builder

      Creates an order for an alternative investment asset.

      Parameters:

      alternativeOrderCreate - An order for an alternative investment.

      The response from the API call

      Exception - if the API call fails

      List Alternative Orders

      Retrieves a list of alternative investment orders for the specified account.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listAlternativeOrders

      public AlternativeOrdersListAlternativeOrdersResponse listAlternativeOrders(String accountId) throws Exception
      List Alternative Orders

      Retrieves a list of alternative investment orders for the specified account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listAlternativeOrders

      public AlternativeOrdersListAlternativeOrdersResponse listAlternativeOrders(String accountId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Alternative Orders

      Retrieves a list of alternative investment orders for the specified account.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of orders to return. - Max value = 100 - Values above 100 will be coerced to 100. - If the specified value is greater than the number of orders, the service will return fewer than the specified value. - If unspecified, at most 100 orders will be returned.
      pageToken - For pagination, provide the page token, received from a previous `ListAlternativeOrders` call, to retrieve the subsequent page. All other parameters provided to `ListAlternativeOrders` must match the request that provided the page token.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results. All fields from the response can be used as filters.

      See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) guide for syntax details and examples.

      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • getAlternativeOrder

      public AlternativeOrdersGetAlternativeOrderRequestBuilder getAlternativeOrder()
      Get Alternative Order

      Retrieves the details for the specified alternative investment order.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • settleAlternativeOrder

      public AlternativeOrdersSettleAlternativeOrderRequestBuilder settleAlternativeOrder()
      Simulate Alternative Order Booking

      Simulates settlement process for an alternative order. For use in UAT environment only.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • settleAlternativeOrder

      public AlternativeOrdersSettleAlternativeOrderResponse settleAlternativeOrder(String accountId, String alternativeOrderId, SettleAlternativeOrderRequestCreate settleAlternativeOrderRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Simulate Alternative Order Booking

      Simulates settlement process for an alternative order. For use in UAT environment only.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      alternativeOrderId - The alternativeOrder id.
      settleAlternativeOrderRequestCreate - Request to settle an alternative order. Note: This is a simulation of settlement for testing purposes only, not to be used in production.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • settleAlternativeOrder

      public AlternativeOrdersSettleAlternativeOrderResponse settleAlternativeOrder(String accountId, String alternativeOrderId, SettleAlternativeOrderRequestCreate settleAlternativeOrderRequestCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Simulate Alternative Order Booking

      Simulates settlement process for an alternative order. For use in UAT environment only.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      alternativeOrderId - The alternativeOrder id.
      settleAlternativeOrderRequestCreate - Request to settle an alternative order. Note: This is a simulation of settlement for testing purposes only, not to be used in production.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
